question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/ContractResultRepository.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: prune(long consensusTimestamp)] Can an unprivileged external user submit a massive volume of contract transactions with maximum-size `functionParameters` blobs, causing the `contract_result` table to grow unboundedly until disk exhaustion halts the importer process, preventing all further block ingestion?
